title: ThePitChallenge
description: Trapped in a 1,000-block deep pit, your only goal is to escape. (part of a YouTube Challenge)
body:
# **ThePitChallenge**

_Can you escape the 1,000-block pit?_

ThePitChallenge drops you into a **colossal 1K-deep pit** with only one goal: climb your way out. No shortcuts. No mercy. Just you, your skills, and the struggle to survive the climb.

This lightweight Fabric pack is designed to keep the experience smooth and immersive without overwhelming you with unnecessary mods. Every frame counts when you’re fighting for your way to the surface.

## 🔧 Features

**Performance First** – **Sodium**, **Lithium**, and **Entity Culling** keep the challenge lag-free even in massive vertical worlds.

**Sky-High Limits** – **2032 World Height** makes escaping the pit possible… if you can manage the climb.

**Immersive Visuals** – **Iris shaders**, **Entity Features**, **OptiBoxes** bring your sky back from optifine, and Flashback for video creation.

**Survival Tools** – WI Zoom for scouting routes

**Multiplayer Ready** – With **Simple Voice Chat,** bring friends along for the escape — or leave them behind.

## 📦 Included Mods

Flashback (0.37.0)

Entity Model Features (3.0.1)

Lithium (1.21.8-0.18.0)

2032 World Height (1.1)

Sodium (1.21.6-0.6.13)

Text Placeholder API (2.7.2+1.21.8)

Entity Culling (1.8.2)

Mod Menu (15.0.0)

OptiBoxes (1.4)

Iris (1.9.1+1.21.7)

Entity Texture Features (7.0.2)

Fabric API (0.133.4+1.21.8)

Simple Voice Chat (1.21.8-2.6.4)

WI Zoom (1.6-1.21.8)
